title: jurinea caespitosa
intro: Jurinea caespitosa, also known as the mountain fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may be attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, Jurinea caespitosa is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and may also help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
